scene_description:
Foreground:
- Road surface: Asphalt with a solid white line along the left edge (left foreground) and a double yellow line running down the center (center foreground).
- Left edge of road: Gravel shoulder with dry, light-brown grass and dense green shrubs (left foreground to midground).
- Right edge of road: Gravel shoulder with dry grass, scattered rocks, and sparse green shrubs (right foreground to midground).

Midground:
- Road: Extends straight into the distance, maintaining the solid white left edge line and double yellow center line (center to background).
- Left side: Dense green shrubs and a small cluster of green trees (left midground), with a low, rocky hill in the background (left background).
- Right side: Dry, brownish terrain with sparse green shrubs and rocky outcrops (right midground), and a larger, gently sloping hill (right midground to background).

Background:
- Left background: Low, rocky hill with sparse vegetation and patches of green (left side of image).
- Right background: Larger, dry hill with brown terrain and scattered green shrubs. Two wooden utility poles with single crossbars and wires (right background, far right edge).
- Sky: Clear, cloudless blue (top of image, spanning entire width). 

No text, signs, vehicles, buildings, street lamps, traffic lights, fire hydrants, or guardrails are visible. The road has no visible license plates, and no crosswalks or lane dividers other than the white and yellow lines described. The terrain is hilly with low vegetation; no trees are visible other than the small cluster on the left midground. The road surface shows no significant damage.

details.name: double yellow line
details.reason: The presence of double yellow lines is a specific road marking used in various countries to denote no-passing zones.
details.focused_description: The double yellow line consists of two parallel, straight lines running along the center of the road. The lines are light yellow in color, made of painted material, and appear continuous as they extend into the distance. The lines are slightly faded in some areas but remain clearly visible. There is no text present on the lines.

details.name: wooden utility pole
details.reason: The style of utility poles, such as those with single crossbars, can help identify regional infrastructure.
